COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
In the matter of Estate of Avia Peters, Deceased.
Ivo Labar, Esq. for Contestants: Berkeley Flockton and James Flockton, also present
Edward Winslow and Mark Oium, Esq. for Respondents: Terry V. Santos and Tomas Ticao, all present.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows: Division of property as follows:
Berkeley Flockton share of 27.5%
James Flockton share of 27.5%
Terry V. Santos share of 22.5%
Tomas Ticao share of 22.5%
Each to bear own fees and costs.
Mutually agreed to sign a written settlement agreement.
All agreed to terms.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoena To Bank Of Americaan Corp
Off Calendar Nov-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Edward Winslow, appeared fro Petitioner/Moving party Tomas Ticao & Terry Santos
Ivo Labar, appeared for Respondent/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Respondents' Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena To Bank of America Corporation For The Production of Respondents' Personal Bank Records is granted. The right to financial privacy of respondents Terry Santos and Tomas Ticao outweighs the intrusion sought without good cause. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
